_comment: pvlib-service watchdog rule chain — ThingsBoard PE import stub (Gap 19).
1. ThingsBoard UI → Rule Chains → Import Rule Chain → select this file.
2. Open the imported chain; find the 'Constant — pvlib host' node.
3. Set its value to your pvlib-service /health URL, e.g.:
4. Create (or designate) a heartbeat device named 'pvlib-watchdog'
in the same tenant.  The alarm will be raised on that device.
- On 'stalled': raise CRITICAL alarm 'pvlib_service_stalled' on the heartbeat device.

configuration.jsScript: var msg = {}; var metadata = { 'triggerType': 'watchdog' }; var msgType = 'WATCHDOG_TICK'; return { msg: msg, metadata: metadata, msgType: msgType };

nodes.name: Constant — pvlib host

configuration._operator_instruction: Replace the URL below with the actual pvlib-service /health endpoint before activating.

nodes._comment: This node is a placeholder.  In practice, embed the URL as a metadata constant in the Script Transform node below.

additionalInfo.description: Edit PVLIB_HEALTH_URL to point to your pvlib-service instance.
HTTP GET to pvlib-service /health.  Response body injected as msg.
Raises alarm on the pvlib-watchdog heartbeat device.
Clears any active pvlib_service_stalled alarm when /health returns ok.
